summary: Comprehensive testing of Phase 5 features completed. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly including: Dashboard settings link, Email Templates page navigation, Personal greeting field in guest forms, Group check-in button for guests with companions, and Email template selection dropdown in email modal.
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up: TEST_ prefixed guests, templates, and events
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 features fully implemented and working. Test credentials: Admin (admin/admin123). New features verified: 1) Group check-in button shows for guests with companions on CheckinPage, 2) Email Templates CRUD available from Settings page, 3) Personal greeting field (personal_greeting) available in guest add/edit forms, 4) Dashboard has E-Mail-Einstellungen quick access card, 5) Email modal on GuestsPage has template dropdown.

features_verified.group_checkin_endpoint: PASS - PUT /api/events/{id}/guests/{id}/group-checkin checks in main guest + all companions
features_verified.personal_greeting_field: PASS - personal_greeting field in guest creation and update
features_verified.dashboard_settings_link: PASS - Mail icon in header + E-Mail-Einstellungen card on dashboard
features_verified.settings_email_templates_link: PASS - E-Mail-Vorlagen link on SettingsPage navigates to EmailTemplatesPage
features_verified.email_templates_page: PASS - EmailTemplatesPage lists templates with create/edit/delete functionality
features_verified.group_checkin_button_ui: PASS - 'Gruppe' button shows on CheckinPage for guests with companions
features_verified.personal_greeting_input_ui: PASS - 'Persönliche Anrede' input field in guest add form with placeholder
features_verified.email_modal_template_dropdown: PASS - 'Vorlage verwenden' dropdown in email modal with template options
